justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options, which led to a very long and unproductive conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the user to specify if they wanted to check earlier or later on a given day, even after the user had already asked for the earliest slot, leading to unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest available slots and its repetitive questioning, leading to a poor customer experience.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest available times and its repetitive questioning made the conversation very inefficient and frustrating for the user.
